_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: The rigosertib + selumetinib and digoxin + selumetinib combinations each showed dramatic increases in median survival when compared with their single-agent results (22 to 47 days and 27 to 47.5 days, respectively, P < 0.001). These increases in survival are among the largest observed in this in vivo model.
details: Combination therapies showed dramatic increases in median survival: rigosertib + selumetinib (22 to 47 days) and digoxin + selumetinib (27 to 47.5 days), both P < 0.001, representing among the largest survival increases observed in this model
